name: GOLFTEC Oklahoma City
address: 1841 Belle Isle Blvd Suite L2, Oklahoma City, OK 73118
about: GOLFTEC Oklahoma City is part of a national golf instruction and club fitting franchise that operates as a high-tech training studio. The venue uses advanced technology, including OPTIMOTION motion capture, launch monitors, and high-speed video analysis, to provide data-driven coaching for golfers of all skill levels. They offer personalized lesson plans, club fittings, and practice memberships with access to training bays equipped with simulators. GOLFTEC is known for its structured approach to improvement, featuring certified PGA coaches who focus on creating customized game plans based on student goals and swing data. The facility is designed as an indoor training environment where players can work on their swing mechanics, practice with technology-enhanced feedback, and get fitted for equipment.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using launch monitors and video analysis
Personalized coaching plans tailored to individual goals
Access to high-tech training bays with simulators and launch monitors
Certified PGA coaches with a team-oriented approach
Custom club fitting with competitive pricing and matching major retailers

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors mentioned for fitting and practice sessions

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides equipment and offers club fitting services with custom options from top brands.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, and it appears the venue does not have a kitchen or bar, so outside food and drinks may not be allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC focuses on lessons and practice sessions rather than full 18-hole simulator play, as their primary service is skill development through technology-driven coaching.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior golf programs and is designed to accommodate golfers of all ages and skill levels, including beginners and youth players.
